items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
❤️【Lady Dio.r My ABC】"Pearlescent Pink"
/5-Grid Lambskin/
This handbag embodies Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty. Crafted from fine lambskin with a signature herringbone stitching for quilting details, its elegant and classic design is timeless. Finished with matching enamel, lined with sheep suede, and featuring a chain shoulder strap with an internal zip pocket, it can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody.
Size: 24×20×11 cm

items.name_cn:
Authentic-grade, Original Factory Leather Version
【Black Leather with Strap ❤ Medium】
Dior Book Tote Shopping Bag
Inspired by Creative Director of Women's Wear Maria Grazia Chiuri, this bag is a flagship product reflecting Dior aesthetics. It holds various daily essentials, featuring a fresh interpretation of the Bayadere pattern mixed with D-Stripes embroidery for a more stylish look. The front is adorned with the "Christian Dior" logo, fully embodying Dior's exquisite craftsmanship.
Style No.: 1286
Size: 36×28 cm

items.name_cn:
Available in Diamond White
Dior D-Joy bag
Fashion is indeed cyclical, returning to a vintage Lady Dior. The special matte calfskin diamond quilted pattern has eight cut faces for a structured look. The full matte hardware, short chain + long strap combo is absolutely god-tier!!
Strong retro chic, suitable for any occasion.
It is definitely the pinnacle of "lady" bags, definitely standing out sisters.
26 x 13.5 x 5cm

DIOR book tote 24 Early Spring Collection

items.name_cn:
Black Calfskin Medium
Dior D-journey Handbag
Don't tell me you still don't know about this? It's gone viral, girls.
Dior has truly mastered the art of "effortless chic" this year.
I have to say the new D-journey is absolutely stunning.
The difficulty to buy is no less than the series; I'm exaggerating, haha.
A casual yet high-end street style, completely changing the previous sweet vibe.
The key is its versatile shoulder strap; all three carrying methods look good.
The large leather pull tab paired with the side pockets adds more personality.
Decorated with a vintage metal Christian Dior logo, it's both decorative and practical.
Dimensions: 33×16×15cm
